mapper.sql: id, employee_no, name, gender, phone, phone_hash, email, id_card, id_card_hash, birthday, registered_address, current_address, dept_id, position_id, grade, report_to, work_location, entry_type, salary_account_id, base_salary, bank_account, bank_account_hash, bank_name, status, entry_date, regular_date, resign_date, user_id, create_time, update_time, encryption_version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM employee WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT FROM employee WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM employee WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo}
SELECT FROM employee WHERE phone_hash = #{phoneHash} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM employee WHERE id_card_hash = #{idCardHash} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM employee WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND status IN (1, 2, 3)
SELECT MAX(employee_no) FROM employee WHERE employee_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
SELECT FROM employee ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT dept_id AS deptId, status AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM employee WHERE status IN (1, 2, 3) GROUP BY dept_id, status
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE position_id = #{positionId} AND status IN (1, 2, 3)
SELECT FROM employee WHERE status = 1 AND regular_date IS NOT NULL AND regular_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee ( employee_no, name, gender, phone, phone_hash, email, id_card, id_card_hash, birthday, registered_address, current_address, dept_id, position_id, grade, report_to, work_location, entry_type, salary_account_id, base_salary, bank_account, bank_account_hash, bank_name, status, entry_date, regular_date, resign_date, user_id, encryption_version ) VALUES ( #{employeeNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{phoneHash}, #{email, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{idCard, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{idCardHash}, #{birthday}, #{registeredAddress, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{currentAddress, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{deptId}, #{positionId}, #{grade}, #{reportTo}, #{workLocation}, #{entryType}, #{salaryAccountId}, #{baseSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{bankAccount, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{bankAccountHash}, #{bankName, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedStringTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{entryDate}, #{regularDate}, #{resignDate}, #{userId}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(employee_no, 7, 3) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM employee WHERE employee_no LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, #{deptCode}, '%')

SELECT FROM employee WHERE status = 1 AND regular_date IS NOT NULL AND DATE_SUB(regular_date, INTERVAL #{deductDays} DAY) <= CURDATE() AND id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT employee_id FROM regularization_application WHERE status IN (0, 1) )
SELECT FROM employee WHERE status = 3 AND resign_date IS NOT NULL AND resign_date <= #{today}
SELECT FROM employee WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM employee WHERE id_card = #{idCard} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET dept_id = #{targetDeptId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE dept_id = #{sourceDeptId} AND status IN (1, 2)
